chapters.title: Welcome to the Cyber Battleground
chapters.description: Why networking matters in cybersecurity and the fundamental mindset of a defender.

chapters.title: The OSI Model: The 7-Layer Burrito
chapters.description: Understand how data travels from an app to the wire. This is the blueprint of the internet.

chapters.title: IPv4 Addressing & Subnetting
chapters.description: Decode the Matrix. Learn how devices find each other and how to carve networks into secure segments.

chapters.title: The TCP/IP Protocol Suite
chapters.description: The language of the internet. Handshakes, reliability, and the connectionless speed of UDP.

chapters.title: Network Devices & Topologies
chapters.description: Routers, Switches, Hubs, and Firewalls. Meet the hardware that makes the cloud possible.

chapters.title: DNS: The Internet's Phonebook
chapters.description: How google.com becomes an IP address, and why hackers love poisoning this process.

chapters.title: DHCP, ARP, and the LAN Party
chapters.description: How devices get an address automatically and find neighbors without shouting too loud.

chapters.title: Network Security Fundamentals
chapters.description: Confidentiality, Integrity, Availability. The CIA Triad and the threats that break them.

chapters.title: Firewalls & Access Control Lists
chapters.description: The bouncers at the club. Learn how to write rules that keep the bad actors out.

chapters.title: VPNs, Proxies, and Encryption
chapters.description: Creating secret tunnels through the dangerous public internet. TOR, HTTPS, and IPsec.
